items.h: Open the kit URL with the browser console open (F12). Page should render with no red console errors.
Click every top-nav button once. Every view should load — no blank panel.
Open Lesson 1, answer the Quick Check, click "Practice this". Visual should show, quiz marks green on correct, and it flows into a drill.
Drag a field into Rows/Values in Pivot Lab — the table should update.
In any drill, tap a wrong choice then a right choice. Wrong = red, right = green + advances. No typing box anywhere.
Complete a lesson, then reload — it should still show done. Toggle theme, reload — theme should persist.
Shrink the window narrow and flip to light mode. Layout should hold, text readable, nothing cut off.

suite.pass: 6. Did a fix break anything? — after fixing bugs

items.h: Re-check everything near what you changed, not only the one bug you were chasing.

items.t: Re-ran the smoke + happy path passes
items.h: Do passes 1–2 again fully. A fix that breaks the basics is worse than the bug it fixed.
Miss a fill-in-the-blank drill a couple times — it should progressively auto-fill on repeated misses (same pattern as other drills).
Check the "___" blank in a fill-in-the-blank question — it should be sized to the actual missing text, not a fixed generic width.
